empty.noCompetitions: You haven't joined any competitions yet
empty.noCompetitionsSubtitle: Browse available competitions and join one to start playing!

detail.noChallengesDescription: Challenge a player above you in the ranking to move up!
detail.editResultConfirm: Updating the result may change ladder positions. Continue?
detail.youHaveActiveChallenge: You already have an active challenge
detail.playerHasActiveChallenge: This player already has an active challenge
detail.canOnlyChallengeAbove: You can only challenge players ranked above you
detail.maxChallengePositions: You can only challenge up to {{positions}} positions above your current rank
detail.mustRespondFirst: You must respond to your pending challenge first
detail.rechallengeCooldownWait: You must wait {{days}} days before challenging this player again
detail.notInLadder: You are not in this ladder
detail.notLadderCompetition: This league is not a ladder competition
detail.playerRetired: This player has retired and cannot be challenged
detail.challengeRangeDesc: You can challenge players up to {{positions}} positions above you. You cannot challenge players ranked below you.
detail.winningChallengeDesc: If you win, you take the position of the player you beat. They move down to your previous position.
detail.losingChallengeDesc: If you lose, positions remain unchanged. Both players stay where they are.
detail.responseDeadlineDesc: Challenged players have {{days}} days to accept or decline. If they don't respond, the challenger wins by walkover.
detail.matchDeadlineDesc: Once a challenge is accepted, the match must be played within {{days}} days.
detail.rechallengeCooldownDesc: After challenging someone, you must wait {{days}} days before challenging them again.
detail.rechallengeCooldownNone: There is no cooldown between challenging the same player.
detail.inactivityPenaltyDesc: Players who don't play a match within {{days}} days may drop {{positions}} positions.
detail.ifYouWin: If you win, you'll move from #{{from}} to #{{to}}
detail.matchDeadlineDays: Match must be played within {{days}} days after acceptance
detail.minimumPlayersDesc: At least 4 players are required to start the tournament.
detail.bracketSizeDesc: The bracket automatically adjusts to 4, 8, 16, or 32 players based on registrations.
detail.byeSystemDesc: If registered players don't fill the bracket, some players receive automatic first-round wins (BYEs).
detail.singleEliminationDesc: Lose a match and you're eliminated. Win to advance to the next round.
detail.matchResultsDesc: After playing, either player can submit the match result.

selection.noLeaguesAvailable: No competitions available in your area yet.
selection.checkBackSoon: We'll let you know when new competitions appear in your area.
selection.checkMyCompetitions: Check back later for new competitions
selection.noLeaguesToJoin: No competitions available to join at this time. Check the competitions below for future availability.

alerts.confirmJoin: Are you sure you want to join this league?
alerts.leaveWarning: You won't be able to rejoin this league after leaving. Any scheduled matches will be forfeited. Are you sure?
alerts.cannotRejoin: You have already retired from this league and cannot rejoin
alerts.challengeSentMessage: Your challenge has been sent. You will be notified when they respond.
alerts.confirmAcceptChallenge: Are you sure you want to accept this challenge?
alerts.challengeAcceptedMessage: The match is now scheduled. Play it within the deadline.
alerts.confirmDeclineChallenge: Are you sure you want to decline this challenge? The challenger may win by walkover if you don't respond.
alerts.confirmCancelChallenge: Are you sure you want to cancel this challenge?

errors.loadErrorMessage: There was a problem loading your leagues. Please try again.
